shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "Next.js posts cache tag updateTag revalidateTag Server Action" --space "default" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "Next.js updateTag posts read-your-writes stale cache" --space "default" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"For the posts App Router flow, the create-post Server Action writes the post and calls updateTag('posts') immediately afterward. updateTag is intentional because it expires the tagged cache immediately and provides read-your-writes behavior; revalidateTag with the stale-while-revalidate profile could serve stale posts after creation. The posts list reader is wrapped in unstable_cache with the posts tag.\" -t \"Posts creation uses immediate cache expiration\" --unit-type decision -l label_nextjs -l label_posts -s codex -i 0.8 --space \"default\""
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,160p' .gitignore && rg -n \"updateTag|revalidateTag|POSTS_TAG|unstable_cache\" app tsconfig.json && stat -c '%n %s bytes' tsconfig.tsbuildinfo 2>/dev/null || true"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
